texts.full_text: a., for Louis Michael Ober. Appeals from the United States District Court for the Western District of Louisiana. Before RUBIN, JOHNSON and WILLIAMS, Circuit Judges. PER CURIAM: 1 Louis Michael Ober filed suit for damages against his employer, Penrod Drilling Company, to recover for injuries sustained during the course and scope of his employment as a crew member aboard Penrod Rig # 51 on July 31, 1978. Jurisdiction was founded on the Jones Act, 46 U.S.C. Sec. 688, and under the general maritime law. Trial was before the district judge sitting in admiralty who rendered Findings of Fact and Conclusions of Law and a Judgment in accord therewith, finding Penrod responsible for the injury to Ober. 2 On the day of his accident, plaintiff was working as a floorhand or roughneck for his employeron Penrod Rig #51. His duties typically involved heavy lifting and handling various pieces of equipment used during drilling operations. According to the testimony presented at trial, Ober sustained injuries when he fell

texts.full_text: discretized sample size re-estimation designs: a comparison of flexibility. In clinical trials, researchers usually determine a study sample size prior to the start of the study to provide a sufficient power at a targeted treatment difference. When the targeted treatment difference deviates from the true one, the study may either have insufficient power or use more subjects than necessary. To address the difficulty in sample size planning, researchers have developed various flexible sample size re-estimation (SSR) methods that allow for adjustments to be made during an ongoing trial based on accumulating data without compromising type I error control and maintaining study integrity. ### Group Sequential Designs Group sequential designs are a class of adaptive design where the analysis is conducted at multiple pre-specified time points or after specific numbers of events, allowing early stopping if significant efficacy (or futility) can be demonstrated. This approach offers flexibility in sample size by potentially reducing it when interim results show strong evidence for an effect earlier than anticipated. ### Discretized Sample Size Re-estimation Designs Discretized SSR designs allow the re-evaluation and adjustment of the initial planned sample size based on estimates obtained from a subset (or pilot phase) or early data. This can be done using either blinded interim analyses, where only summary statistics are used without revealing treatment assignments to avoid biasing subsequent decisions; unblinded analysis may also occur with careful considerations for maintaining trial validity and controlling type I error rates. ### Comparison of

texts.full_text: xt project. My name is Jake Dejarnett and I'm a session bassist out of Nashville Tn, with my own high end recording studio capable of providing a solid bass line to your tracks. Using top of the line gear like Neve, SSL, Kemper, Avalon, and more for tracking and have high end basses like Fender and Warwick to achieve great tone. The tools for the job plus the experience of working for 14 years as a professional musician combine to a great sounding and feeling bass line to match your tracks style and intensity. I have worked with artists and producers like CaleDodds, Matt McClure, Ryan Tyndell, and many more! The genres I typically work within include Country, Pop Rock, Christian Contemporary (CCM), Folk Americana; you name it—the versatility is what makes my playing unique. Whether your project needs some thunderous low-end groove or something intricate with beautiful melodies worked into the bassline... no matter how simple to complex we get I promise every note and technique intentionally used will contribute positively toward whatever magic you’re trying create for all listeners! Examples of past work are included in my reels; take a listen on YouTube by searching Jake DeJarnett Bass or check out www.jakedejernattbass.com Feel free to contact me with any questions about potential projects 24/7!! You won't find better rates and value around for top-notch quality professional session musicians ready at your fingertips now available online; Let’s make music together! Message
